message:
test(fsqlite): add extensive SQL parity and integration tests

Add ~1700 lines of integration tests covering SQL feature parity:

- REPLACE INTO / INSERT OR IGNORE conflict handling
- Multi-column ORDER BY
- SELECT without FROM (arithmetic, functions, expressions)
- VALUES clause with multiple rows
- Computed LIMIT/OFFSET expressions (LIMIT 2+1, LIMIT abs(-4))
- WHERE with column-column and column-expression comparisons
- SELECT * with GROUP BY (with and without aggregates, IPK tables)
- INSERT DEFAULT VALUES (with/without explicit defaults, auto-rowid)
- Aggregate expression arguments (SUM(a+b), AVG(a*b), COUNT(DISTINCT expr))
- CAST edge cases (text→int prefix parsing, blob→text UTF-8)
- DISTINCT aggregate deduplication
- FILTER clause on aggregates
- CASE/WHEN expressions in queries
- hex(NULL) → '' parity fix verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
